profile.title: Profile
profile.confirmDelete: Delete your account? This cannot be undone.

legal.privacyContent: Data is stored in PostgreSQL behind HTTPS. Passwords use bcrypt with 12 rounds. Auth tokens use httpOnly Secure SameSite=Strict cookies. No tracking, no third-party sharing. Pokémon trademarks belong to Nintendo / The Pokémon Company. This is an unofficial fan project by 42 students.
legal.termsContent: By creating an account you agree to these terms. Use the platform respectfully. No harassment, malicious content, or security testing. You may delete your account anytime. This is an educational project provided as-is without warranty.

privacy.section1Body: When you create an account, we collect your email, username, and avatar. Your password is hashed with bcrypt.
privacy.section2Body: Your information is used exclusively to provide platform services. We do not sell or share your data.
privacy.section3Body: Data is stored in PostgreSQL, encrypted via HTTPS. Auth tokens use httpOnly secure cookies. Passwords use bcrypt (12 rounds).
privacy.section4Body: You can view, edit, and delete your profile and all associated data at any time.
privacy.section5Body: We use a single httpOnly Secure SameSite strict authentication cookie. No tracking.
privacy.section6Body: This is a student project for the 42 school curriculum.

terms.section1Body: By creating an account you agree to these terms. Educational project for 42 school.
terms.section2Body: Use the platform respectfully. No harassment, malicious content, or security breaches.
terms.section3Body: You are responsible for your credentials and account activity.
terms.section4Body: You retain ownership of uploads. Pokémon trademarks belong to Nintendo / The Pokémon Company.
terms.section5Body: This project is provided "as is" without warranty.
terms.section6Body: You may delete your account anytime. We may suspend accounts violating these terms.
terms.section7Body: Pokémon © Nintendo, Creatures Inc., GAME FREAK Inc. Unofficial fan project, not affiliated with Nintendo.

success.registrationComplete: Account created! You can now log in.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.invalidToken: Session expired. Please log in again.
error.conflict: That value is already in use
error.emailOrUsernameTaken: A user with that email or username already exists
error.cannotSendBlocked: Cannot send request to this user
error.noPendingFromUser: No pending request from that user
error.guildNameTaken: A guild with that name already exists
error.notGuildOwnerUpdate: Only the owner can update the guild
error.notGuildOwnerDelete: Only the owner can delete this guild
error.notGuildOwnerAccept: Only the owner can accept members
error.notGuildOwnerRemove: Only the owner can remove members
error.notMember: User is not a member of this guild
error.alreadyGuildRequested: A request has already been sent
error.alreadyMember: Already a member of this guild
error.newOwnerMustBeMember: New owner must be a member
error.noGuildPending: No pending request from that user
error.cardNameTaken: A card with that name already exists

validation.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameTooLong: Username must be at most 30 characters
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 60 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
validation.guildNameTooShort: Guild name must be at least 3 characters
validation.guildNameTooLong: Guild name must be at most 30 characters
validation.invalidHealth: Health must be a non-negative integer
validation.invalidFileType: Invalid file type (png, jpg, gif, webp)
